/ucrt64/bin/c++.exe -shared -Wl,--enable-auto-import -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--version-script=/home/studentcoll/Sand/vendored/SDL_ttf/src/SDL_ttf.sym -o ../../msys-SDL3_ttf-0.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libSDL3_ttf.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,3 "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable_ttf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_gpu_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_renderer_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_surface_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_ttf.c.o"  ../SDL/libSDL3.dll.a external/harfbuzz-build/libharfbuzz.a external/freetype-build/libfreetype.a external/plutosvg-guild/libplutosvg.a external/harfbuzz-build/libharfbuzz.a external/freetype-build/libfreetype.a external/harfbuzz-build/libharfbuzz.a external/freetype-build/libfreetype.a external/plutovg-build/libplutovg.a
